{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Horizon's fabricators
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has upgraded fabricators.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“You were vital to our preparations, and Horizon’s upgraded fabricators were all that allowed us to stand our ground, but you served virtually no use in this fight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
